# Pricing — MEOK AI Labs | Pro £199/mo, Enterprise £1,499/mo, 48h Assessment £5,000

> MEOK pricing: Free £0/mo, Pro £199/mo, Enterprise £1,499/mo, 48h Assessment £5,000, Article 50 Kit £999, Watchdog Cert £4,950. Sovereign UK. 100% EU AI Act + UK AI Bill compliance. 49 days to Article 50.

## Overview
Pricing — MEOK AI Labs | Pro £199/mo, Enterprise £1,499/mo, 48h Assessment £5,000 is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
